_comment: Sigil-selector-fix cutover (commit b4701dc). New core stack DEPLOYED + STAGED on Arbitrum Sepolia 2026-06-04, NOT yet flipped live. The app keeps using the contracts in arbitrum_sepolia.json until the 48h timelock matures (2026-06-06T09:10Z) and `scripts/cutover-tplus48-execute.sh run` lands the fill, after which the app's contract addresses are flipped to these.
reason: Sigil.validate_action exported Vec<u8> as Solidity uint8[] (selector 0x0e9c8ea4) instead of bytes (0x20aa2205), so every agent-mandate validateAction call fell through the Stylus fallback (Plinth code 6). Fix = stylus_sdk::abi::Bytes. The fixed Sigil requires a fresh Plinth (no sigil setter) + Router (immutable plinth) cascade.

sigil.note: validateAction(bytes,bytes)=0x20aa2205 fixed; initialized praetor=deployer, timelock=0x0dad24d7, plinth=new Plinth

plinth.note: multi-fragment (2 fragments) via atrium-stylus docker cargo-stylus 0.10.7; constructor wired -> new Sigil + existing coffer/vigil/registry/chainlink/pyth/real-timelock/plinth-math/plinth-oracle

atrium-router.note: forge create; constructor(new Plinth, coffer, registry, deployer-praetor, real-timelock)

verifiedLive: staticcall new Plinth.openPosition with an envelope bound to the new Sigil reverts code 9 (UNKNOWN_VENUE), NOT code 6 (INVALID_ACTION_SIGIL) -> the Sigil selector fix passes validation on chain. #430 is resolved in the deployed V11 adapter (032-SC11 supplies min(notional,funded)) so the fill will land.
complete: After 2026-06-06T09:10Z: `bash scripts/cutover-tplus48-execute.sh run` (executes the 3 ops, pushes Pyth, drives the real agent-mandate fill via the new Router, verifies). Then flip the app: replace sigil/plinth/atrium-router addresses in arbitrum_sepolia.json + apps/verify NEXT_PUBLIC envs with the newStack values, commit, push (Vercel auto-deploys).
